历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Soochow University in Shanxi's science/physics category were: approximately 8514 in 2021, 8099 in 2022, 7561 in 2023, 14380 in 2024, and 8374 in 2025. In 2024, due to batch consolidation, the ranking significantly dropped, but it quickly rebounded to 8374 in 2025, showing a volatile pattern in recent two years. The science enrollment plan was 85 in both 2021 and 2022, dropped to 56 in 2023, 55 in 2024, and 52 in 2025 for the physics category. In 2026, the physics category has 37 spots plus 15 for medical category, totaling 52, unchanged from 2025. A stable plan indicates no change in enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 46th (45th in 2025, 43rd in 2024), with a stable ranking in the 40-46 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-high level 211 universities with strong comprehensive strength. In 2024, its reputation was slightly positive (cafeteria improvements received praise); in 2026, its reputation is slightly negative (involving campus safety incidents). Its Douyin popularity ranks 46th overall (relatively popular), with moderate to high short video exposure. No abnormal historical admission records were found for Soochow University, indicating no signs of admission gaps. Overall, the slightly negative reputation in 2026 may mildly suppress application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University received A- in Physical Education and A- in Pharmacy. Materials Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Computer Science are traditional strengths, closely matching the enrollment majors such as Materials, Clinical Medicine, and Computer Science and Technology, supporting applications in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, popular majors include Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., which remain highly recommended; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology also maintain recommendation popularity. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shanxi is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition due to the reduced candidate pool. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has strong geographical appeal to Shanxi examinees. The university enrolls 52 students in Shanxi's physics category, a relatively large scale for cross-provincial enrollment, with overall positive geographical preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors: the baseline ranking in 2025 was 8374, the 2026 enrollment plan is unchanged from 2025, but the 3.4% decrease in Shanxi's physics category examinees slightly eases competition, while the slightly negative reputation in 2026 mildly suppresses application enthusiasm, partially offsetting each other. The competition relief effect from the reduced candidate pool slightly dominates. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward (smaller ranking number) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8294, with a range of 7794 to 8794.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Soochow University's medical programs in Shanxi Province have fluctuated significantly over the past five years: 8,514 in 2021 (plan: 19 students), sharply rising to 6,336 in 2022 (plan: 13 students), falling back to 10,768 in 2023 (plan: 16 students), further declining to 15,004 in 2024 (plan: 17 students), and strongly rebounding to 9,100 in 2025 (plan: 15 students). In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is 15 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction. However, the large fluctuations in rankings in recent years reflect the instability of competition for medical programs.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a key national university under Project 211 and a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines have a long history, with multiple affiliated hospitals. Programs such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology enjoy high reputations in the Yangtze River Delta region, strongly attracting candidates from Shanxi Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs nationwide continue to maintain high application enthusiasm, with core programs such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 integrated program) and Stomatology being particularly competitive. Soochow University is located in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, with strong urban appeal and broad employment prospects. The small enrollment scale for medical programs in Shanxi (only 15 students) creates a tight supply-demand relationship, further increasing admission difficulty.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model and analysis of historical ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Soochow University's medical programs in Shanxi Province in 2026 is expected to be around 8,950, slightly higher than the 9,100 in 2025 (smaller ranking number indicates increased competition). The fluctuation range is expected to be between 8,681 and 9,219. Candidates with rankings within this range are advised to actively apply, and those with rankings within 9,000 have a greater chance.
